verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a full consensus among all five agents in Round 1. Terminating the debate immediately was the optimal decision, as no disagreement existed to resolve.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence, noting that all five agents converged on Nigeria. The reasoning correctly prioritized the hard constraint of right-hand traffic (regulatory) to rule out Ghana, while acknowledging the supporting linguistic and landscape evidence.
